For example, if this shape applies an effect to a button, the [doc://com.apple.uikit/documentation/UIKit/UIShape-swift.struct/ResolutionContext/contentShape] might represent the bounding shape of that button’s background. # contentShape

**Instance Property**

The resolved shape of the content to which this shape can apply.

## Declaration

```swift
var contentShape: UIShape.Resolved
```

## Discussion

For example, if this shape applies an effect to a button, the [doc://com.apple.uikit/documentation/UIKit/UIShape-swift.struct/ResolutionContext/contentShape] might represent the bounding shape of that button’s background. You typically size a dynamic shape relative to the bounding rectangle of the [doc://com.apple.uikit/documentation/UIKit/UIShape-swift.struct/ResolutionContext/contentShape].
title: contentShape
